name: Soccer
description:
Soccer is a team-based sports game where two teams of eleven players compete to score by kicking a ball into the opposing team's goal. The game is played on a rectangular field with a goal at each end. Players can move around the field, pass the ball to teammates, and shoot the ball towards the goal. The team with the most goals at the end of the match wins. 

The game includes typical soccer rules regarding fouls, offsides, corner kicks, penalty kicks, and throw-ins. AI controls the opposing team and teammates, and the difficulty level of AI can be adjusted. The player directly controls one player on their team at a time. The player can switch which player they are controlling during the game. When not controlling a player directly, the AI manages their movements. The goalkeeper is also controlled by the AI. 

Game modes should include: Single Game (play a single match), Tournament (compete in a series of matches to win a championship), and Practice (free play with no opponent).

controls.arrow_up: Move the currently controlled player forward.
controls.arrow_down: Move the currently controlled player backward.
controls.arrow_left: Move the currently controlled player to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Move the currently controlled player to the right.
controls.w: Short Pass: Performs a short-range pass to a nearby teammate.
controls.s: Long Pass: Performs a longer-range pass, aiming for a teammate further down the field.
controls.a: Tackle: Attempt to dispossess an opponent of the ball. Can result in a foul.
controls.d: Sprint: Temporarily increases the player's speed, but drains stamina.
controls.space: Shoot: Attempts to shoot the ball towards the goal.
controls.shift: Change Player: Switches control to the player closest to the ball.
controls.q: Sliding Tackle: Performs a more aggressive tackle. Higher risk of a foul.
controls.e: Lob Pass: A high, arcing pass intended to go over opponents.
controls.z: Special Move 1: Executes a player-specific skill move (e.g., step-over).
controls.x: Special Move 2: Executes a player-specific skill move (e.g., flick-up).
controls.c: Team Press: Instructs the team to apply pressure to the opposing team holding the ball. Drains team stamina faster.
